id.description: Unique identifier of the menu item

imageUrl.description: Image URL or Base64 representation of the dish

createdAt.description: ISO structure or Firebase timestamp indicating when item was added

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order placed by a specific table

tableId.description: Identifier of the table placing the order

items.description: List of ordered items with quantities and snapshot details

status.description: Current preparation state of the order

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order was placed

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order status was last updated

Banner.title: Banner
Banner.description: A singleton representing promotional banner configuration

imageUrl.description: Banner background image URL or Base64 representation

visible.description: Controls whether the banner is shown to clients

updatedAt.description: Timestamp for the last banner modification

/orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of tables and their placed orders

/settings/banner.description: Single record representing the top promotional banner
